title: Pronouncing Particles and Verbs
learningGoal: The learner will accurately pronounce complete action sentences, focusing on the flow between the noun, particle, and verb.
instructions: Listen to the native speaker and repeat the sentences. Make sure to smoothly connect the particle (wo, ni, de) to the noun that comes before it, without pausing.

contentItems.text: The 'wo' particle is written as 'wo', but it is pronounced exactly like 'o'. Listen closely to the audio.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: ごはんを たべます
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Pronouncing 'wo' with a 'w' sound. It should be a pure 'o' sound.
Saying 'nomimasu' with emphasis on 'mi'. Keep the pitch flat.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: がっこうに いきます
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Ignoring the double 'k' in gakkou. There must be a tiny pause before 'kou'.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: うちへ かえります
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Pronouncing the 'r' in kaerimasu like an English R. It is a soft flap.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: カフェで のみます
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Saying 'Kafe ni'. You must use 'de' for the location of an action.

targetPhrasesOrWords.targetText: はちじに おきます
targetPhrasesOrWords.commonMispronunciation: Not pronouncing the 'i' clearly in Hachi-ji.

expectedPronunciationText: ごはんをたべます みずをのみます がっこうにいきます うちにかえります えいがをみます はしでたべます カフェでのみます はちじにおきます

feedbackRules.onPass: Perfect! You successfully pronounced the particles and verbs with good flow.
feedbackRules.onFail: Keep practicing! Remember that 'wo' sounds like 'o', and the 'u' at the end of 'masu' is almost silent.
feedbackRules.onPartial: Good effort. Try to link the particle directly to the noun before it without a pause.

adminCorrectAnswerSet.exactCorrectTranscript: ごはんをたべます みずをのみます がっこうにいきます うちにかえります えいがをみます はしでたべます カフェでのみます はちじにおきます
acceptedVariants: ごはんを たべます みずを のみます がっこうに いきます うちに かえります えいがを みます はしで たべます カフェで のみます はちじに おきます
adminCorrectAnswerSet.syllableSplitReference: go-ha-n-o ta-be-ma-su mi-zu-o no-mi-ma-su ga-k-ko-u-ni i-ki-ma-su u-chi-ni ka-e-ri-ma-su e-i-ga-o mi-ma-su ha-shi-de ta-be-ma-su ka-fe-de no-mi-ma-su ha-chi-ji-ni o-ki-ma-su
adminCorrectAnswerSet.phoneticApproximation: gohano tabemasu mizuo nomimasu gakkouni ikimasu uchini kaerimasu eigao mimasu hashide tabemasu kafede nomimasu hachijini okimasu
adminCorrectAnswerSet.nativeScriptReference: ごはんを たべます みずを のみます がっこうに いきます うちへ かえります えいがを みます はしで たべます カフェで のみます はちじに おきます
adminCorrectAnswerSet.transliteration: Gohan wo tabemasu Mizu wo nomimasu Gakkou ni ikimasu Uchi ni kaerimasu Eiga wo mimasu Hashi de tabemasu Kafe de nomimasu Hachi-ji ni okimasu

audioAssets.audioTranscript: ごはんを たべます。みずを のみます。がっこうに いきます。うちに かえります。えいがを みます。はしで たべます。カフェで のみます。はちじに おきます。

hintText: Make sure the 'u' in 'masu' is barely pronounced. It should sound like 'mahs'.
commonMistakes: Pronouncing 'wo' with a heavy W sound.
